message:
feat(workflows): Add PaneWorkflowLockManager for per-pane workflow locks (wa-nu4.1.1.2)

Implements in-memory per-pane workflow lock/reservation system:

- PaneWorkflowLockManager: Thread-safe lock table keyed by pane_id
- LockAcquisitionResult: Detailed lock acquisition outcome with holder info
- PaneLockInfo: Serializable lock metadata (pane_id, workflow, execution_id)
- PaneWorkflowLockGuard: RAII guard for automatic lock release on drop
- 12 unit tests including concurrent access simulation

Also includes fixes for WorkflowStepLogRecord tests (add duration_ms field)
and imports for HealthSnapshot/ShutdownSummary in runtime.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
